ValidationRule.description: Perten Sales reps will not be able to set their Opportunities to Closed Won Stage, only designated team will.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Closed Won"), OR($UserRole.Name = "Perten US Account Manager", $UserRole.Name = "Perten US Regional Manager",$UserRole.Name = "Perten CA Account Manager",$Profile.Name = "Informatics Sales")))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_019: You are not authorized to make changes to Closed Won Opportunities. Please refer to your manager or finance/order team for help.
